internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u} (enumeration : FinEnum α) (p : α → Prop) (decideP : (value : α) → Decidable (p value)),
  match Core.FiniteSearch.first enumeration p decideP with
  | Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult.found hit => hit.value ∈ enumeration.orderedValues ∧ p hit.value
  | Core.FiniteSearch.FirstResult.absent none => ∀ (value : α), ¬p value
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.first_total
internalDeclarations.docString:
Ordered search is sound and exhaustive over the entire enumerated
universe.

internalDeclarations.type:

  (∀ (context : Context), left context = right context) ∨ ∃ context, left context ≠ right context
